TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_Teng_Li_jiun, title = Teng_Li_jiun, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/Teng_Li_jiun} }

S.FORM: == Teng Li Jiun 鄧麗君 == u siwkay niza Teng Li Jiun (1953.129-1995.5.8), tatayna, nu Taywan a mudadiway atu mupalaway. 1967 a mihca, patahkal tu ku sakacacay a dadiw-cuanci. 1970-1980 a mihca, takalaw ku kawaw niza , singangan i kitakit. sisa singangan tu ku "Yaco Dadiw a tatayna". 1995 a mihca, zayhan adada' ciniza , caay kakapah ku hanhan niza, u uzip niza 42 mihca. a'su ku dadiw niza, sangulan ku bihid niza. aluman ku manamuh cinizaan. mapatay ciniza sa, katuud ku malalumay i kiatakit. u sapuyaay a kakuniza u kawaw niza u sulit nu Hulam Teresa Teng (29 January 1953 – 8 May 1995) was a Taiwanese singer. She was known for her folk songs and romantic ballads, such as "When Will You Return?" and "The Moon Represents My Heart". She recorded songs not only in her native Mandarin but also in Taiwanese Hokkien, Cantonese, Japanese,Indonesian and English. Teng, a longtime sufferer of asthma, died from a severe respiratory attack while on vacation in Thailand in 1995, at the age of 42. u sulit nu Lipun . u kawlah niza Taywan a kawlah (amicunus henay tu sulit.待補充) u uzip niza (amicunus henay tu sulit.待補充)
S.PHON: == təŋ r~ɾi *iun *** == u siwkaj niza təŋ r~ɾi *iun (****.***-****.*.*), tatajna, nu tajwan a mudadiwaj atu mupar~ɾawaj. **** a miħʦa, pataħkar~ɾ tu ku sakaʦaʦaj a dadiw-ʦuanʦi. ****-**** a miħʦa, takar~ɾaw ku kawaw niza , siŋaŋan i kitakit. sisa siŋaŋan tu ku "jaʦo dadiw a tatajna". **** a miħʦa, zajħan adadaʔ~ʡ ʦiniza , ʦaaj kakapaħ ku ħanħan niza, u uzip niza ** miħʦa. aʔ~ʡsu ku dadiw niza, saŋur~ɾan ku biħid niza. ar~ɾuman ku manamuħ ʦinizaan. mapataj ʦiniza sa, katuud ku mar~ɾar~ɾumaj i kiatakit. u sapujaaj a kakuniza u kawaw niza u sur~ɾit nu ħur~ɾam tərəsa təŋ (** *anuarj **** * * maj ****) was a taiwanəsə siŋər. sħə was known for ħər for~ɾk soŋs and romantiʦ bar~ɾr~ɾads, suʦħ as "wħən wir~ɾr~ɾ jou *əturn?" and "tħə moon *əprəsənts mj ħəart". sħə rəʦordəd soŋs not onr~ɾj in ħər nati*ə mandarin but ar~ɾso in taiwanəsə ħokkiən, ʦantonəsə, *apanəsə,indonəsian and əŋr~ɾisħ. təŋ, a r~ɾoŋtimə suffərər of astħma, diəd from a sə*ərə rəspiratorj attaʦk wħir~ɾə on *aʦation in tħair~ɾand in ****, at tħə agə of **. u sur~ɾit nu r~ɾipun . u kawr~ɾaħ niza tajwan a kawr~ɾaħ (amiʦunus ħənaj tu sur~ɾit.***) u uzip niza (amiʦunus ħənaj tu sur~ɾit.***)
S.FORM: == Teng Li Jiun 鄧麗君 == u siwkay niza Teng Li Jiun (1953.129-1995.5.8), tatayna, nu Taywan a mudadiway atu mupalaway. 1967 a mihca, patahkal tu ku sakacacay a dadiw-cuanci. 1970-1980 a mihca, takalaw ku kawaw niza , singangan i kitakit. sisa singangan tu ku "Yaco Dadiw a tatayna". 1995 a mihca, zayhan adada' ciniza , caay kakapah ku hanhan niza, u uzip niza 42 mihca. a'su ku dadiw niza, sangulan ku bihid niza. aluman ku manamuh cinizaan. mapatay ciniza sa, katuud ku malalumay i kiatakit. u sapuyaay a kakuniza u kawaw niza u sulit nu Hulam Teresa Teng (29 January 1953 – 8 May 1995) was a Taiwanese singer. She was known for her folk songs and romantic ballads, such as "When Will You Return?" and "The Moon Represents My Heart". She recorded songs not only in her native Mandarin but also in Taiwanese Hokkien, Cantonese, Japanese,Indonesian and English. Teng, a longtime sufferer of asthma, died from a severe respiratory attack while on vacation in Thailand in 1995, at the age of 42. u sulit nu Lipun . u kawlah niza Taywan a kawlah (amicunus henay tu sulit.待補充) u uzip niza (amicunus henay tu sulit.待補充)
S.PHON: == təŋ r~ɾi *iun *** == u siwkaj niza təŋ r~ɾi *iun (****.***-****.*.*), tatajna, nu tajwan a mudadiwaj atu mupar~ɾawaj. **** a miħʦa, pataħkar~ɾ tu ku sakaʦaʦaj a dadiw-ʦuanʦi. ****-**** a miħʦa, takar~ɾaw ku kawaw niza , siŋaŋan i kitakit. sisa siŋaŋan tu ku "jaʦo dadiw a tatajna". **** a miħʦa, zajħan adadaʔ~ʡ ʦiniza , ʦaaj kakapaħ ku ħanħan niza, u uzip niza ** miħʦa. aʔ~ʡsu ku dadiw niza, saŋur~ɾan ku biħid niza. ar~ɾuman ku manamuħ ʦinizaan. mapataj ʦiniza sa, katuud ku mar~ɾar~ɾumaj i kiatakit. u sapujaaj a kakuniza u kawaw niza u sur~ɾit nu ħur~ɾam tərəsa təŋ (** *anuarj **** * * maj ****) was a taiwanəsə siŋər. sħə was known for ħər for~ɾk soŋs and romantiʦ bar~ɾr~ɾads, suʦħ as "wħən wir~ɾr~ɾ jou *əturn?" and "tħə moon *əprəsənts mj ħəart". sħə rəʦordəd soŋs not onr~ɾj in ħər nati*ə mandarin but ar~ɾso in taiwanəsə ħokkiən, ʦantonəsə, *apanəsə,indonəsian and əŋr~ɾisħ. təŋ, a r~ɾoŋtimə suffərər of astħma, diəd from a sə*ərə rəspiratorj attaʦk wħir~ɾə on *aʦation in tħair~ɾand in ****, at tħə agə of **. u sur~ɾit nu r~ɾipun . u kawr~ɾaħ niza tajwan a kawr~ɾaħ (amiʦunus ħənaj tu sur~ɾit.***) u uzip niza (amiʦunus ħənaj tu sur~ɾit.***)
